_secrets: Lokalne sem (config.json je gitignored), v cloude cez GitHub Actions secrets (ENV). NIKDY necommituj config.json.
_niches: enabled = bezi v dennom behu; minutes = dlzka videa; youtube_refresh_token = OAuth daneho kanala (alebo ENV YT_REFRESH_<NIKA>).
_optional_suno: Neskor: plny auto cez Suno API (lofi/melodicke kanaly). Teraz zadarmo cez vlastny generator.
